程序包 mypakege

package mypakege
  • 类
    说明
    Classroom
    Enum representing predefined classroom locations (room/building/campus).
    Course
    Enum representing the predefined courses in the registration system.
    Date
    A simple Date class in mm/dd/yyyy format used by the registration system.
    Frontend
     
    Instructor
     
    Major
    Represents the supported student majors and the school each major belongs to.
    Profile
    A Profile uniquely identifies a student by last name, first name, and date of birth.
    RunProject1
     
    Schedule
     
    Section
     
    Standing
    Represents a student's academic standing, determined by completed credits.
    Student
    Represents a student eligible for registration.
    StudentList
    A resizable array-based list of Student objects.
    Time
    Represents the six class periods in a day and their start times.
